items.summary: As divisive as the Disney era of Star Wars has been, it's also produced some terrific characters. Here's our ranking of the best ones.

items.summary: Arnold Schwarzenegger's pre-Terminator career is fascinating, and we love this forgotten comedy film co-starring Jeff Bridges.

items.summary: The Acolyte was canceled after one season, but recently reappeared in the Disney+ top 10. Star Manny Jacinto would be happy to return, on one condition.

items.title: Disclosure Day's Secret Indiana Jones Homage Echoes A Chilling Last Crusade Moment
items.summary: Steven Spielberg loves a high-stakes train-based setpiece, and Disclosure Day echoes one from Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade.
